calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Timothy Ryan, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, HSBC Bank USA N.A., as Trustee on behalf of ACE Securities Corp. Home Equity Loan Trust and for the Registered Holders of ACE Securities Corp. Home Equity Loan Trust 2007-D1 Asset Backed Pass-Through Certificates.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) KATE ROGERS.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Cedric Bankston sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $241,192.64
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 8.29% in the amount of: $80,479.39 as of January 10, 2014 together with additional interst from January 10, 2014 accruing at the per diem rate of $55.54 in the amount of $2,943.62, together with advanced costs by Plaintiff in the sum of $22,930.03; reasonable attorneys' fees $6,547.00 as provided for in the Complaint and pursuant to the Note and Deed of Trust; plus allowable costs incurred herein in the amount of $1,709.00 and an additonal amount for post judgment Sheriff's fees and costs to be determined at the time of sale. The court orders that the real property described in paragraph 1 of the Complaint, located in the City of San Francisco, County of San Francisco, State of California, commonly known as 611 Campbell Ave. San Francisco, CA 94134 and legally described as set forth in Exhibit 1, and incorporated herein, be sold in the manner prescribed by law, and that a writ of sale be issued to the Sheriff of San Francisco County or the authorized entity to conduct such a sale, ordering and directing the Sheriff or the authorized entity to conduct such a sale, and the proceeds therefrom shall be applied to the payment of the judgment, interest, attorneys' fees, costs, and such other sums as Plaintiff has advanced prior to judgment.
Any party too this action may purchase the property at the sale. From the sale proceeds, the Sheriff or the authorized entity shall pay to Plaintiff, after deducting expenses of the levy and sale, the sums adjudged owing under paragraph 4, together with interest at the stautory rate from the date of this judgment.
Defendant Kate Rogers is not a person against whom a deficiency judgment may be ordered and is not personally liable for the payment of the sums secured by the Deed of Trust.
On cmpletion of the sale, the sheriff shall execute a deed of sale to the purchasers who may then take possession of the property, if necessary with the assistance of the Sheriff of San Francisco County.
Defendants and all persons claiming from or under Defendants, all persons and their personal representatives having liens subsequent to the Deed of Trust by judgment or decree on the described real property, all persons and their heirs or personal representatives having any lien or claim by or under such subsequent judgment of decree, all persons claiming under them, and all persons claiming to thave acquired any estate or interest in the premises after the recordation of notice of the pendency of this action with the County Recorder are forever barred and foreclosed from all equity of redemption in and claim to the premises, from and after delivery of the deed by the Sheriff.

Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-23-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-11-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2013 Continued To May-08-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Continued To Mar-06-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
